reasoning: Racing Bulls (VCARB) functions as a midfield team. In 2025, the top 4 teams (Red Bull, McLaren, Ferrari, Mercedes) are virtually locked in to finish ahead of them. This leaves the 5th place contested mainly by Aston Martin, Williams, Alpine, Haas, and VCARB. Williams is acquiring Carlos Sainz, making their lineup very strong for 2025. Aston Martin has a larger budget, better infrastructure, and Alonso. VCARB occasionally has strong seasons (6th in 2021) but has generally placed 7th-9th in recent years. Beating out both Aston Martin and Williams to secure exactly 5th place will require exceptional car development, which is constrained by their status as a pseudo-B-team. Thus, the probability of them finishing exactly 5th is relatively low, estimated at around 8%.
